calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim;
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Petitioner is allowed to withdraw the Petition for Forfeiture and may proceed with Non-Judicial Forfeiture proceedings. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Counsel Form
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion to compel answers to petitioner's first set of demand for production and inspection of documents; petitioner's first set of special interrogatories; judicial council form interrogatories granted.
1. All objections are waived except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Within ten days of notice of entry of this order, claimant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to petitioner's first set of demand for production and inspection of documents, first set of special interrogatories, and judicial council form interrogatories. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
